notes: All taper branches fix negative_scale=1.0, so the negative multiplier at zero standardized distance is the full canonical alpha 0.11.
Only the distance-decay coefficient is tuned; positive advantages, canonical actor-critic training, datasets, seeds, horizon, and evaluation protocol remain unchanged.
The original coefficients are retained as grid points; stronger coefficients test whether far-field suppression can improve final performance without uniformly shrinking near-field negatives.
Positive-only and canonical signed are controls. A passthrough original ExpRank_MR branch may be supplied by the run spec.
This is pilot-only parameter tuning under EXT-H-E7-BENCH-01 and cannot establish a formal nine-task ranking.
Primary model-selection evidence is the 1M-step final score; best-in-trajectory remains diagnostic only.
